nodes.title: Positive prompt
widgets_values:
clarazelyy, a 25-year-old Caucasian woman with a warm golden tanned complexion, lies prone on a rumpled beige linen bedspread. Her body is angled away from the camera, highlighting her athletic hourglass silhouette and the natural, toned curves of her lower body. She wears a thin black thong that creates delicate tension lines against her smooth, sun-kissed skin, and white ribbed cotton crew socks that show a clear knit texture. Her long wavy ash blonde hair, with visible highlights and lowlights, spills over her shoulder and onto the duvet. Her face is partially obscured as she rests her cheek against her hand, with only one of her almond-shaped brown eyes peering toward the lens, creating an intimate and candid mood.

The scene is set in a bedroom with a deep olive green wall. A large, frameless circular mirror is mounted centrally, reflecting a black clothing rack organized with various hoodies and shirts, providing a realistic glimpse into the lived-in environment. The light is soft and directional, originating from a nearby window, which accentuates the fine dermatological details of her skin, including natural pores, subtle freckles across her nose, and micro-variations in her tanned tone. The fabric physics of the linen sheets are captured with realistic folds, shadows, and a coarse surface grain. The composition follows a handheld smartphone logic, featuring a slight wide-angle perspective distortion that naturally emphasizes the foreground subject. Every element, from the individual strands of hair to the tension in the thong's waistband, is rendered with optical precision and believable dynamic range. Coherent anatomy and realistic light-to-shadow transitions ensure a raw, authentic photographic quality without artificial smoothing or waxy textures.

Camera + Technical Metadata: Handheld smartphone capture, 24mm equivalent wide-angle lens, f/1.8, natural ambient light, realistic mobile sensor rendering, sharp foreground focus with readable background reflection.
